---
title: "R Notebook"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(reshape)
library(ggplot2)
library(nlme)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotrix)
library(emmeans)
```

```{r}
metadata <- read.csv(file = "GH_2018_metadata_V4.csv", header = T)
#Added a Total_veg column to account to total biomass without tubers. 

metadata$Total = as.numeric(metadata$Total)
metadata$Roots = as.numeric(metadata$Roots)
metadata1 <- subset(metadata, Shoots >= 0 & Roots >= 0)
```


#Approach 1: Cross sectional analysis of biomass for each generation: 

##Tubers

Defining functions for analysis b/c its gonna get repetitive: 
```{r}
metadata_tuber <- subset(metadata, Tuber_Mass != "NA")

#Iteration 1 (No conditioning): 
metadata_tuber1 = subset(metadata_tuber, Iteration == 1)
lm_tuber1 = lmer(Tuber_Mass ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_tuber1)
summary(lm_tuber1)
anova(lm_tuber1)

```

```{r}
plot_tuber1 = emmip(lm_tuber1, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_tuber1

df_tuber1 = as.data.frame(plot_tuber1$data)
plot_tuber1 = ggplot(df_tuber1, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Biomass")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_tuber1
```



```{r}
#Iteration 2: 
metadata_tuber2 = subset(metadata_tuber, Iteration == 2)
lm_tuber2 = lmer(Tuber_Mass ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_tuber2)
summary(lm_tuber2)
anova(lm_tuber2)
```

```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_tuber2, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_tuber2 = emmip(lm_tuber2, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_tuber2

df_tuber2 = as.data.frame(plot_tuber2$data)
plot_tuber2 = ggplot(df_tuber2, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Response")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_tuber2
```

```{r}
#Iteration 3: 
metadata_tuber3 = subset(metadata_tuber, Iteration == 3)
lm_tuber3 = lmer(Tuber_Mass ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_tuber3)
summary(lm_tuber3)
anova(lm_tuber3)

contrast(emmeans(lm_tuber3, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_tuber3 = emmip(lm_tuber3, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_tuber3

df_tuber3 = as.data.frame(plot_tuber3$data)

```
```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_tuber, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_tuber = emmip(lm_tuber, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_tuber

df_tuber = as.data.frame(plot_tuber$data)
plot_tuber3 = ggplot(df_tuber, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Biomass")+
  ylim(0,20)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_tuber3
```



```{r}
#Iteration 4:
metadata_tuber4 = subset(metadata_tuber, Iteration == 4)
lm_tuber = lmer(Tuber_Mass ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_tuber4)
summary(lm_tuber)
anova(lm_tuber)

```


```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_tuber, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_tuber = emmip(lm_tuber, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_tuber

df_tuber = as.data.frame(plot_tuber$data)
ggplot(df_tuber, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Biomass")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()
```


```{r}
#Iteration 5:
metadata_tuber5 = subset(metadata_tuber, Iteration == 5)
lm_tuber5 = lmer(Tuber_Mass ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_tuber5)
summary(lm_tuber5)
anova(lm_tuber5)
```


```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_tuber5, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_tuber5 = emmip(lm_tuber5, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_tuber5

df_tuber5 = as.data.frame(plot_tuber5$data)
plot_tuber5 = ggplot(df_tuber, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Biomass")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "None")

plot_tuber5

```


```{r}
plot_grid(plot_tuber1,plot_tuber3,plot_tuber5, nrow = 1, labels=c('D','E','F'))
```

***

##Shoots/Vegatative biomass

```{r}
metadata_Shoots1 = subset(metadata1, Iteration == 1)
lm_shoots1 = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_Shoots1)
summary(lm_shoots1)
anova(lm_shoots1)
```
```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_shoots1, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots_i1 = emmip(lm_shoots1, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots_i1
df_shoots_i1 = as.data.frame(plot_shoots_i1$data)
```



```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_shoots, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots = emmip(lm_shoots, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots

df_shoots = as.data.frame(plot_shoots$data)
plot_i1 = ggplot(df_shoots, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,25)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_i1
```


```{r}
#Iteration 2
metadata_Shoots2 = subset(metadata1, Iteration == 2)
lm_shoots = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_Shoots2)
summary(lm_shoots)
anova(lm_shoots)
```


```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_shoots, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots = emmip(lm_shoots, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots

df_shoots = as.data.frame(plot_shoots$data)
ggplot(df_tuber, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```


```{r}
#Iteration 3

metadata_Shoots3 = subset(metadata1, Iteration == 3)
lm_shoots3 = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_Shoots3)
summary(lm_shoots3)
anova(lm_shoots3)

```
```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_shoots3, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots_i3 = emmip(lm_shoots3, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots_i3
df_shoots_i3 = as.data.frame(plot_shoots_i3$data)
```



```{r}
plot_i3 = ggplot(df_shoots, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,10)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_i3
```



```{r}
#Iteration 4

metadata_Shoots4 = subset(metadata1, Iteration == 4)
lm_shoots4 = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_Shoots4)
summary(lm_shoots4)
anova(lm_shoots4)
```


```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_shoots4, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots4 = emmip(lm_shoots4, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots4

df_shoots = as.data.frame(plot_shoots4$data)
ggplot(df_shoots, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,10)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```


```{r}
#Iteration 5
metadata_Shoots5 = subset(metadata1, Iteration == 5)
lm_shoots5 = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Clade * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_Shoots5)
summary(lm_shoots5)
anova(lm_shoots5)
```
```{r}
contrast(emmeans(lm_shoots5, ~ LiveSoil * Clade), interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots_i5 = emmip(lm_shoots5, Clade ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Clade = c("A","C","M"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots_i5
df_shoots_i5 = as.data.frame(plot_shoots_i5$data)
```


```{r}

plot_i5  = ggplot(df_shoots, aes(x = Clade, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,10)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_i5
```



```{r}
library(cowplot)
plot_grid(plot_i1,plot_i3,plot_i5, labels=c('A','B','C'), nrow = 1)
```


***

Rick's Comments: Similar comments as above. - add error bars or switch to boxplots, Add legends, change y-axis titles, 

Have you considered making these graphs more as a time series - instead of showing the three clades in one iteration on each graph, show one clade across iteration 1, 3, and 5 (sterile and live) ? If the goal is to compare the clades to each other at each point in time, the graphs as they are is probably best. But if the goal is to compare how one clade changes through interations, that is harder to see in this set-up.


Let's partition based on Potato Clade: 

Andigenum Clade: 
```{r}
metadata_ShootsA = subset(metadata1, Clade == 'A')
metadata_ShootsA$Iteration = as.factor(metadata_ShootsA$Iteration)
lm_shootsA = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Iteration * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_ShootsA)
summary(lm_shootsA)
anova(lm_shootsA)
```

```{r}
EM_meansA = emmeans(lm_shootsA, ~ LiveSoil | Iteration)
EM_meansA
#Correct statistical model!!

contrast(EM_meansA, interaction = "pairwise")
plot_shoots = emmip(EM_meansA, Iteration ~ LiveSoil, at = list(Iteration = c("1","2","3","4","5"), LiveSoil = c("N","Y")), dodge = 0.1)
plot_shoots
#Not how we want to display the model tho...

df_shoots = as.data.frame(plot_shoots$data)
plot_And  = ggplot(metadata_ShootsA, aes(x = Iteration, y = Total_Veg))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_boxplot(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,25)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_And
```


Chiletanum Clade: 

```{r}
metadata_ShootsC = subset(metadata1, Clade == 'C')
metadata_ShootsC$Iteration = as.factor(metadata_ShootsC$Iteration)
lm_shootsC = lmer(Total_Veg ~ LiveSoil * Iteration * (1|Genotype), data = metadata_ShootsC)
summary(lm_shootsC)
anova(lm_shootsC)
EM_meansC = emmeans(lm_shootsC, ~ LiveSoil | Iteration)
EM_meansC
```


```{r}
plot_Chi = ggplot(metadata_ShootsC, aes(x = Iteration, y = Total_Veg))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_boxplot(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,40)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_Chi
```


```{r}
plot_Chi = ggplot(metadata_ShootsC, aes(x = Iteration, y = Total_Veg))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_boxplot(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,40)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_Chi
```

***

hmmm...this is weird and not consistent with emmeans data that we got earlier. Not sure why, but there's lots of noise here. So let's try actually just simply just squishing emmeans tables from all three then making the histograph of the biomass instead. 


```{r}
df_shoots_i1 = mutate(df_shoots_i1, Iteration = 1)
df_shoots_i3 = mutate(df_shoots_i3, Iteration = 3)
df_shoots_i5 = mutate(df_shoots_i5, Iteration = 5)

df_shoots_PLOT = rbind(df_shoots_i1,df_shoots_i3, df_shoots_i5)
df_shoots_PLOT$Iteration = as.factor(df_shoots_PLOT$Iteration)

```


```{r}
df_shoots_A = subset(df_shoots_PLOT, Clade == "A")

plot_Andigenum  = ggplot(df_shoots_A, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,25)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_Andigenum
```

```{r}
df_shoots_C = subset(df_shoots_PLOT, Clade == "C")

plot_Chiletanum  = ggplot(df_shoots_C, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,25)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_Chiletanum
```


```{r}
df_shoots_NA = subset(df_shoots_PLOT, Clade == "M")

plot_NorAm  = ggplot(df_shoots_NA, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(0,25)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_NorAm
```

```{r}
library(cowplot)
plot_grid(plot_Andigenum,plot_Chiletanum,plot_NorAm, labels=c('A','B','C'), nrow = 1)
```


***

Now let's try with Tubermass: 

```{r}
df_tuber1 = mutate(df_tuber1, Iteration = 1)
df_tuber3 = mutate(df_tuber3, Iteration = 3)
df_tuber5 = mutate(df_tuber5, Iteration = 5)

df_tubers_PLOT = rbind(df_tuber1,df_tuber3, df_tuber5)
df_tubers_PLOT$Iteration = as.factor(df_tubers_PLOT$Iteration)
```


```{r}
df_tubers_A = subset(df_tubers_PLOT, Clade == "A")

plot_tubers_Andigenum  = ggplot(df_tubers_A, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(-10,45)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_tubers_Andigenum
```


```{r}
df_tubers_C = subset(df_tubers_PLOT, Clade == "C")

plot_tubers_Chiletanum  = ggplot(df_tubers_C, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(-10,45)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_tubers_Chiletanum
```

```{r}
df_tubers_NA = subset(df_tubers_PLOT, Clade == "M")

plot_tubers_NorAm  = ggplot(df_tubers_C, aes(x = Iteration, y = yvar))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0)+
  geom_col(position = "dodge2", aes(fill = LiveSoil))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = yvar - SE, ymax = yvar + SE), position = "dodge2")+
  labs(y = "Biomass (g)")+
  ylim(-10,45)+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "Live vs Sterile Soil")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plot_tubers_NorAm
```


```{r}
library(cowplot)
plot_grid(plot_tubers_Andigenum,plot_tubers_Chiletanum,plot_tubers_NorAm, labels=c('D','E','F'), nrow = 1)
```
